REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-620499 WITH CASE CGC-24-614595 / NOTICE OF MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES IS DENIED. CONSOLIDATION IN THIS MATTER WILL SIGNIFICANTLY DELAY THE TRIAL OF CZEKALA V. GREENVIEW PLANNING AND DESIGN LLC, CASE NO. CGC-24-614595, WHICH HAS A TRIAL DATE OF JULY 14, 2025. TRIAL IN THE OTHER MATTER, GOUGH/FELL ASSOCIATES, L.P. V. GREENVIEW PLANNING AND DESIGN, LLC, CASE NO. CGC-24-620499, HAS NOT EVEN BEEN SET. DISCOVERY IN THE CZEKALA CASE HAS ALREADY PROCEEDED, AND DISCOVERY IS SET TO CLOSE AROUND THE TIME THIS MOTION IS SET TO BE HEARD. CONSOLIDATION WILL ALSO SEVERELY PREJUDICE THE PLAINTIFF IN THE CZEKALA CASE, WHO HAS BEEN DISPLACED FROM HER HOME OF OVER 40 YEARS AND LOST ALL OF HER PERSONAL BELONGINGS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: VANESSA WU; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-620499 WITH CASE CGC-24-614595 / NOTICE OF MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES
Off Calendar Jun-12-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances

Raquel Fox, Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc., 415-771-9850, in-person for plaintiff
Kayla Le, Spriingel & Fink LLP, 714-957-5742, via zoom for defendant

Ms. Le contests to the tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-620499 WITH CASE CGC-24-614595 / NOTICE OF MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES is DENIED. Consolidation in this matter will significantly delay the trial of Czekala v. Greenview Planning and Design LLC, Case No. CGC-24-614595, which has a trial date of July 14, 2025. Trial in the other matter, Gough/Fell Associates, L.P. v. Greenview Planning and Design, LLC, Case No. CGC-24-620499, has not even been set. Discovery in the Czekala case has already proceeded, and discovery is set to close around the time this motion is set to be heard. Consolidation will also severely prejudice the plaintiff in the Czekala case, who has been displaced from her home of over 40 years and lost all of her personal belongings.

Order Signed. Judge Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Vanessa Wu; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-24-620499 WITH CASE CGC-24-614595
